_comment: Example OS fingerprint corpus for `pontus-cli scan --os-corpus`. These rules are LAYERED OVER the built-in clean-room defaults (they do not replace them). A rule fires when every condition it specifies holds; matched rules add `weight` to their `family`, and the highest-scoring family wins. Keep entries clean-room: derive TTL/window values from public OS documentation and match `banner_substring` against strings a host volunteers — never copy from nmap-os-db (C-001).
